title: Health Canisters
description: Adds a new way to increase your maximum health.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/MSJnWEC.png)

It is a **vanilla friendly, minor** mod that allows you increase your maximum health points and adds couple of other stuff.

![](https://i.imgur.com/mwEK55r.png)

It brings **6** new items as well as **4** new crafting recipes.

  
![](https://i.imgur.com/3Y50vUs.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/ikSuPOR.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/R7ASyHR.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/piCrRsG.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/aCIwapX.png)

Obtaining hearts is a bit tricky since it is hard to keep them in the inventory.

By default, you can only drop hearts when you are **not** at **full** health. When you're not at full health, collecting a heart off the ground will **restore** your missing health **immediately**.

To keep hearts in your inventory, you must drop them and then collect them when you are back at **full** health.

Golden hearts cannot be kept in the inventory, and by default, they can only be dropped when your health is **full**.

![](blob:https://imgur.com/7f7b3420-6b89-407e-ae90-d502340eb09e)![](https://i.imgur.com/mvvkckE.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/itgEcN0.png)

First one being normal and second one golden.

Default hearts **heal** you golden ones **grant you absorption** that can be **stacked**.

![](https://i.imgur.com/xPYnFdd.png)

As an owner I do not **allow** my mod to be reposted on sites other than CurseForge.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.
